creator: jeff-ml@mountin.net
text:
Several master either no longer exist or
	no long mirror the Apache distribution.

	Unknown host - apache.artic.org
	No mirror found - ftp.ameth.org ftp.connectnet.com galileo.galilei.com
		(2nd has empty dir and 3rd is FUBAR)
	Anonymous login fails - ftp.mtnranch.net

	These hosts have been checked at various times and dates for
	the past several releases.  Figure it's time to clean house.

	Two changed directories and with the other 8 sites, should
	be plenty to choose from.  About half have 1.3.14 now.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to ftp manually.
